$comment: Expected analytics results showing time-bucketed aggregations

$explanation.bucket_alignment: Buckets are aligned to 5-minute boundaries: 12:00, 12:05, 12:10, etc.
$explanation.dimension_grouping: Each bucket is further split by dimension values (status: draft vs published)
$explanation.aggregation_type: count returns the number of events in each bucket+dimension combination

$invariants.deterministic_bucketing: Same events + query always produce same buckets
$invariants.time_alignment: Bucket timestamps are aligned to bucketSize intervals from epoch
$invariants.dimension_separation: Different dimension values create separate buckets even in same time window
$invariants.tenant_isolation: Buckets MUST NOT include data from other tenants
